notFound.title: Horizon Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for has drifted away or never existed in this archipelago.

errorPage.title: Rough Waters Ahead
errorPage.description: We encountered an unexpected current. Our team has been notified and is working to stabilize the horizon.

landing.heroSubtitle: A premium beach experience at El Montazah

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to start your premium booking journey
auth.termsNotice: By signing in you agree to our Terms and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
auth.adminSignInSubtitle: Enter your admin credentials to continue.
auth.passwordRule: At least 8 characters, with letters and numbers.
auth.weakPassword: Choose a stronger password — at least 8 characters, mixing letters and numbers.
auth.linkSentBody: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a secure link. The link expires in 30 minutes.
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.invalidOrExpired: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
auth.verifyChecking: Hang tight while we check your link…
auth.verifySuccessBody: You're nearly there — set up your account to continue.
auth.verifyExisting: That email is already registered. Sign in with your password.
auth.emailTaken: That email is already in use.
auth.phoneTaken: That phone number is already in use.
auth.resetSubtitle: Almost done — pick a strong password.
auth.resetSuccessBody: Use your new password to sign in.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter the email on your account and we'll send a secure link.
auth.completeRegSubtitle: A few details so we know it's you.
auth.errorGeneric: Sign-in didn't complete. Please try again.
auth.errorConfiguration: We can't reach this sign-in provider right now. Try a different option, or contact support if this keeps happening.
auth.errorAccessDenied: Sign-in was cancelled. You can try again whenever you're ready.
auth.errorVerification: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a fresh one to continue.
auth.errorOAuth: We couldn't finish signing you in with that provider. Please try again or use a different method.
auth.errorOAuthLinking: This email is already linked to another sign-in method. Sign in the original way to continue.

profile.completeSubtitle: We need a few details before you can book.
profile.emailRequired: Email is required — please enter a valid email address.
profile.idInvalid: Enter a valid 14-digit National ID, or a valid passport number.

aurelia.heading:
Choose how the day
unfolds.
aurelia.emptyBody: Try a different chip or come back later — new offerings are added regularly.

aureliaDesktop.headingSub: Between beachside calm, vibrant moments, and refined details… Crown Island creates a day like no other.
aureliaDesktop.briefNoReservations: Nothing booked yet — pick an experience to start your day.
aureliaDesktop.briefWeatherDetail: Hazy sun · light NE breeze · sunset 18:42
aureliaDesktop.briefConciergeMessage: Questions about your booking or your visit? Our team is happy to help — reach out anytime.

about.missingContent: Detailed information for this experience is coming soon.

services.selectServiceSubtitle: Pick the option that fits your visit. You can adjust dates and guests next.

ageGate.restrictedBody: You must be {minAge} or older to enter this category.
ageGate.signInPrompt: Sign in with an account that has your age on file to continue.
ageGate.updateAgePrompt: Your account doesn't meet the minimum age for this category, or your age isn't on file. Update your profile if this is a mistake.

categoryTerms.title: Terms & Conditions
categoryTerms.subtitle: Please review and accept the terms for {category} to unlock its services.
categoryTerms.checkboxLabel: I have read and agree to these terms
categoryTerms.scrollHint: Scroll to the end of the terms to continue.
categoryTerms.readyHint: Thank you — you may now accept.

booking.multiDayHint: Leave blank for a single day, or pick a later date for a multi-day stay.
booking.childrenAgeNote: Children are guests aged {age} years or under.
booking.childrenFreeNote: Children are free and don't count toward the 4-adult limit.
booking.childrenFreeAllowanceNote: The first {count} children are free; extra children are charged.
booking.explainUmbrellas: {units} umbrella(s) — each covers up to {capacity} people.
booking.childrenPerUmbrellaNote: Up to {count} children per umbrella (more adults = more umbrellas = more children).
booking.explainExtraPeople: {count} extra guest(s) beyond the included allowance — charged per person.
booking.explainExtraChildren: {count} extra child(ren) beyond the free allowance.
booking.extraPersonsNote: Each extra person is billed separately and does not change the number of umbrellas/cabanas.
booking.extraPersonsNotePriced: Each extra person adds {price} and does not change the number of umbrellas/cabanas.
booking.penaltiesHint: These amounts were added by the administration and are collected together with this booking. They are paid once — your next bookings will not include them again.
booking.insuranceHint: A refundable deposit collected with your payment. It is returned at reception checkout according to the resort's policy — discounts and vouchers never reduce it.
booking.insuranceCardRefundDelay: Your bank may take a few days to post the refund to your account.
booking.insuranceRetainedHint: The deposit was retained per the resort's policy. Please contact reception for details.
booking.confirmedSubtitle: Your ticket for {experience} is ready — see you on {date}.
booking.completePaymentHint: Your booking is reserved but not paid yet. Complete the payment to confirm it.
booking.ticketEmailedNote: A copy of your ticket has been sent to your email. Present the QR code at the Main Gate on arrival — no printout needed.
booking.failedSubtitle: Please try again or use a different card
booking.refundedNotice: Your card was charged, but the booking could not be completed (for example, the last spot was taken while you were paying). The full amount has been refunded automatically — it usually appears on your card within a few business days.
booking.qrCaption: Show this code at the entrance
booking.zkPassSubtitle: Use this QR or your card at your cabin door. Active for your whole booking day.
booking.zkPassPending: Preparing your cabin access… this updates automatically.
booking.disabledSubtitle: We're not accepting new reservations right now. Please check back soon — your existing bookings are unaffected.

errors.capacity: Not enough capacity for this date — please pick another date.
errors.priceChanged: The price has changed — please review again.
errors.pastDate: You cannot book a date in the past.
errors.workingHoursEnded: Operational hours for today have ended — please pick a later date.
errors.invalidDays: The selected dates are not valid for this service.
errors.childrenNotAllowed: Children are not available for this service.
errors.maxChildren: Too many children for one booking — please reduce the number of children.
errors.maxExtraPersons: Too many extra persons for this booking — please reduce the number of extra persons.
errors.maxPeople: Maximum {max} people per booking — please reduce the number of guests.
errors.maxCars: Maximum {max} cars per booking — please reduce the number of cars.
errors.bookingsDisabled: Bookings are temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.leadTime: This date is too close — please pick a later one.
errors.cancellationCutoff: It's too late to cancel this booking — please contact support.
errors.bookingAlreadyUsed: This booking date has already passed.
errors.bookingNotCancellable: This booking can no longer be cancelled.
errors.paidCancellationReception: Paid bookings are cancelled by reception — please contact us. Your refund follows the policy.

setupPrompt.title: Get the full experience
setupPrompt.subtitle: Turn on notifications and add the app to your home screen.
setupPrompt.installDesc: Add Crown Island to your home screen.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.heading: Notifications
notifications.selectHint: Choose one from the list to read it here.
notifications.allCaughtUp: You're all caught up — no unread notifications.
notifications.empty: No upcoming notifications. You'll see your booking reminders here.
notifications.enableBody: Allow notifications so we can remind you the moment your booking time arrives.
notifications.enableDenied: Notifications are blocked. Enable them in your browser settings to receive alerts.
notifications.enableUnsupported: This browser doesn't support notifications, but your bookings will still appear here.

history.title: My bookings
history.subtitle: Every reservation across Crown Island — past, present and upcoming.

reviews.prompt: How was your visit? Your feedback helps us and other guests.
reviews.errorGeneric: Could not submit your review. Please try again.

cancellation.title: Cancel this booking
cancellation.policyIntro: Refunds follow the schedule below. The amount is locked the moment you request — a later review can never lower it:
cancellation.pendingBody: Requested on {date}. Awaiting reception review. You'll be refunded {percent}% ({amount}), locked at your request time.
cancellation.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

adminCancellations.title: Cancellation Requests
adminCancellations.subtitle: {count} pending
adminCancellations.empty: No cancellation requests match these filters.
adminCancellations.protectedByLock: The frozen tier pays more than today's tier — the guest is protected from the processing delay.
adminCancellations.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

adminInsurance.title: Insurance Refunds
adminInsurance.subtitle: {count} awaiting approval
adminInsurance.empty: No insurance refunds match this view.
adminInsurance.manualAttentionBody: The workflow could not resolve this refund automatically. Verify the gateway state before retrying.
adminInsurance.staleDeskWarning: This desk payout has been pending for {days} days — the guest may not be able to return to the desk. You can complete it remotely by InstaPay below.
adminInsurance.noProviderOrder: No gateway order reference on the captured payment — a card refund cannot be executed.
adminInsurance.finalOutcome: {status} on {date}. This attempt is final — corrections append a new attempt.
adminInsurance.processingInfo: The gateway call is in flight (or being verified by the reconciliation sweep). No action is possible until it resolves.
adminInsurance.confirmApprove: Refund {amount} to the original card — cannot be undone
adminInsurance.deskPendingInfo: Awaiting desk payout — reception hands the deposit back at checkout (cash or InstaPay).
adminInsurance.deskCompleteHint: For guests who cannot return to the desk: transfer the deposit by InstaPay, then upload the transfer proof image. The proof is mandatory.
adminInsurance.approveDone: Refund sent to the gateway and completed.
adminInsurance.approveGatewayFailed: The gateway rejected this refund — the attempt is marked Failed and can be retried.
adminInsurance.reopenReasonPlaceholder: Why is the retention being reversed? (required)
adminInsurance.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
adminInsurance.errorAlreadyProcessed: Already handled by another admin — refresh the page.
adminInsurance.errorOnlineOwned: Insurance refunds are managed on the online master — make this change there.
adminInsurance.errorOverRefund: This refund would exceed the captured amount — it was flagged for review.
adminInsurance.errorNoPayment: No captured card payment to refund.
adminInsurance.errorMethodMismatch: Refund method does not match the original payment channel.
adminInsurance.errorProofRequired: An InstaPay transfer proof image is required.
adminInsurance.errorUploadFailed: Proof upload failed — please try again.

adminReviews.title: Guest Comments
adminReviews.subtitle: {count} reviews
adminReviews.notePlaceholder: Optional note to the guest (shown on rejection)…
adminReviews.publicToggleHint: Show or hide approved reviews on customer-facing pages

menu.title: Restaurants
menu.comingSoonBody: Our restaurant ordering experience is coming soon.
menu.directorySubtitle: Browse our partner restaurants, open a profile, download the menu and get in touch.
menu.empty: No restaurants here yet — check back soon.
menu.manageSubtitle: Create and update the profile guests see on the restaurants page.
menu.partnersOnlyBody: This area is for restaurant partner accounts. If you run a restaurant on the island, please contact the administration.
menu.noMenu: The menu has not been uploaded yet.
menu.statusPending: Your profile is awaiting approval — guests can’t see it yet.
menu.statusRejected: Your profile was rejected. Update it and save to resubmit for review.
menu.statusDisabled: Your profile is currently disabled by the administration.
menu.statusApproved: Your profile is live — guests can see it on the restaurants page.
menu.previewBanner: Preview — this restaurant is not visible to guests yet.

form.name: Restaurant name

form.coverHint: JPG, PNG or WebP — shown on your card and profile.
form.menuPdfHint: A single PDF guests can download — up to 15MB.

errors.name_short: The name must be at least 2 characters.

errors.description_long: The description is too long (max 2000 characters).

errors.hours_long: Opening hours text is too long (max 120 characters).

settings.title: Settings
settings.downloadAppDesc: Install Crown Island on your device for a faster, full-screen experience.
settings.installHintIos: On iPhone or iPad, open this page in Safari, tap the Share icon, then choose “Add to Home Screen”.
settings.installHintGeneric: Open your browser menu and choose “Install app” or “Add to Home Screen”.

settings.notificationsDesc: Choose what we email you about

settings.pushInsecureOrigin: Notifications need a secure (https) connection. Open the site over https to enable them.
settings.pushIosAddToHome: On iPhone, add this site to your Home Screen (Share → Add to Home Screen), then open it from there to receive notifications.
settings.signOutAllDevicesDesc: End your sessions on every device, including this one.

gate.title: MAIN GATE
gate.scanDesc: Point the camera at the guest's Crown Island QR or barcode confirmation.
gate.alreadyAdmittedSub: This pass has been used today. Override only with supervisor approval.
gate.invalidPassSub: Do not admit. Direct the guest to the ticket office.
gate.assignPlacesHint: Select {needed} {type} place(s) — {selected} chosen. Suggested places are highlighted.
gate.placeTaken: That place was just taken — pick another.

gate.outageTapHint: Tap an amber place to see why it's out of service.
gate.unknownPassReason: Pass not recognised — not issued by Crown Island
gate.idleHeroDesc: Ask the guest to present their Crown Island QR or barcode confirmation at the camera. Booking details and entitlements will appear here for verification.
gate.signOutDesc: You'll be returned to the sign-in screen and will need your email and password to scan again.

reports.title: Reports
reports.empty: No data for the selected filters.

bookingsTab.emptyTable: No bookings match the selected filters.

cabanas.noOutages: No out-of-service windows in this range.
cabanas.tableNote: Revenue is the booking invoice net total split across its place-days; multi-day bookings crossing the range edges count only their in-range days.
cabanas.emptyTable: No places found — places exist only on services with place assignment enabled.
cabanas.footnote: Out-of-service history is recorded from the time the downtime log was added; windows deleted before then are not counted. Open-ended offline spans count toward downtime until the place is switched back online.

customers.topSpendersNote: Online customers only — reception walk-ins have no account.
customers.emptyTable: No paid customer bookings in this range.

admin.refundSuccess: Refund processed successfully. The booking has been cancelled and capacity released.

admin.error_no_refundable_payment: No refundable payment found for this booking (must be SUCCEEDED).
admin.error_paymob_already_refunded: This transaction has already been refunded in Paymob.

entering.title: Visitors entering now
entering.help: Tap each guest's ID photo to admit them now; the rest can scan their QR at the gate later. Select none to admit everyone later.
entering.uploadFirst: Upload guest IDs first to choose who enters now.

success.title: Booking created
success.subtitle: Guest IDs verified — the party is ready for the gate.
success.subtitleWithPlaces: Guest IDs verified · places assigned — the party is ready for the gate.

errors.unsupported_type: Only JPG, PNG or WEBP images are accepted.
errors.empty_file: That file is empty or unreadable.
errors.network: Upload failed — check the connection and retry.

errors.forbidden: You are not authorised for the reception desk.
errors.service_inactive: That service is no longer available.
errors.past_date: Cannot book for a past date.
errors.working_hours_ended: Working hours for today have ended.
errors.promo_inactive: That promo code is no longer active.
errors.promo_not_started: That promo code is not active yet.
errors.promo_cap_reached: That promo code has reached its usage limit.
errors.promo_already_used: This customer has already used that promo code.
errors.promo_invalid: Please enter a valid promo code.
errors.one_discount_only: Use either a promo code or a custom discount — not both.
errors.over_role_cap: That discount exceeds the supervisor's limit.
errors.not_authorized: That staff member cannot authorize discounts.
errors.capacity: Not enough capacity for the requested number of people/cars.
errors.blocked: This guest is blocked and cannot be booked.
errors.guest_id_required: Upload an ID for every adult before booking.
errors.guest_id_number_required: Enter a valid ID/passport number for every adult before booking.
errors.guest_id_source_invalid: A reused ID from a previous visit is no longer available — replace it with a fresh photo.
errors.guest_id_source_forbidden: A reused ID doesn't belong to this customer — replace it with a fresh photo.
errors.offline: Offline — the venue can't reach the server, so new bookings are paused. Check-in still works; try again once the connection is back.
errors.sync_not_deployed: The online server hasn't been updated yet (reception sync endpoint missing). Deploy the latest build to the online server, then try again.
errors.sync_auth: Sync rejected: the SYNC_SECRET doesn't match between this venue node and the online server.
errors.sync_misconfig: Sync is misconfigured (ONLINE_API_URL or APP_MODE). Check the venue node's environment.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

admitErrors.not_admissible: Guests can't enter today — this booking is for a future date. They'll be admitted on the visit date, or at the gate that day.
admitErrors.placement_required: Assign every place before admitting the guests.
admitErrors.guest_id_required: Every guest needs an uploaded ID before they can be admitted.
admitErrors.blocked: This guest is blocked and cannot be admitted.
admitErrors.no_guest_selected: No eligible guest was selected to enter now.
admitErrors.forbidden: You are not authorised to admit guests.
admitErrors.not_found: The booking hasn't finished syncing to this device yet — try again in a moment, or admit the guests at the gate.
admitErrors.unknown: The booking was created, but the selected guests couldn't be admitted now — they can still enter at the gate.

booking.partyValue: {people, plural, one {# person} other {# people}}{children, plural, =0 {} one { (# child)} other { (# children)}}

deposit.title: Insurance deposit
deposit.notCollected: The deposit was never collected — there is nothing to decide or refund.
deposit.voided: The deposit was voided (the booking never completed payment).

decision.title: Checkout decision
decision.prompt: Decide the deposit before the guest leaves: refund {amount} or retain it with a reason. This is recorded and cannot be undone at the desk.
decision.confirmRefund: Refund {amount} to the guest? Card deposits go to admin approval; desk deposits open the payout below.
decision.reasonPlaceholder: Why is the deposit being retained? (e.g. damaged equipment)
decision.reasonRequired: A reason is required to retain the deposit.
decision.confirmNoRefund: Retain the {amount} deposit? The guest gets nothing back and the reason is stored.

payout.title: Desk payout
payout.subtitle: Return {amount} to the guest over the desk. Pick how the money goes back.
payout.cashConfirmPrompt: Confirm you physically handed {amount} in cash to the guest. This completes the refund.
payout.proofRequiredNote: A photo of the InstaPay transfer is required before the refund can be completed.

admin.title: Sent for admin approval
admin.body: The {amount} card deposit is refunded to the original card after an administrator approves it. No desk action is needed.

errors.forbidden: You are not authorised for the reception desk.
errors.offline: Offline — the venue can't reach the server, so deposit decisions are paused. Try again once the connection is back.
errors.sync_not_deployed: The online server hasn't been updated yet (insurance sync endpoint missing). Deploy the latest build to the online server, then try again.
errors.sync_auth: Sync rejected: the SYNC secret doesn't match between this venue node and the online server.
errors.sync_misconfig: Sync is misconfigured (ONLINE_API_URL / node mode) — deposit actions can't reach the online server.
errors.online_owned: Deposits are managed on the online master — this venue node could not forward the action.
errors.insurance_not_found: This booking has no insurance deposit.
errors.insurance_not_collected: The deposit was never collected — there is nothing to decide.
errors.insurance_already_decided: The deposit decision was already recorded (maybe by another operator). The page has the latest state after a refresh.
errors.insurance_reason_required: Enter a reason to retain the deposit.
errors.insurance_nothing_refundable: The deposit has already been fully refunded.
errors.insurance_proof_required: Upload the InstaPay transfer proof image first.
errors.insurance_refund_method_mismatch: That refund method doesn't match how the deposit was paid.
errors.insurance_already_processed: This refund was already processed (maybe by another operator).
errors.insurance_over_refund: The refund would exceed the collected deposit — flagged for review.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong — please try again.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Crown Island is a beach resort in El Montazah, Egypt, with a booking web app that lets you reserve and manage your visit. This policy explains, in plain language, what personal information we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
body: We collect the information you give us and the information we need to run your booking and your visit to the resort. The amount we collect depends on whether you create an account, book online, or are checked in at our reception desk.
Where the law requires identity verification to enter the resort, providing certain details (such as a national ID or passport) is necessary to complete your booking.
bullets: Account and contact details: your name, email address, phone number, and a securely hashed password (we never store your password in readable form). If you sign in with a third-party provider (such as Google), we receive your name, email, and profile picture; third-party sign-in is linked to your account by your email address.

Identity documents: an Egyptian national ID number or passport number on your profile, and photos of guests' identity documents captured at check-in for adults in your party. Children are admitted as guests and do not have ID images taken.

Profile and accessibility details: your full name, age, country and Egyptian region, an optional profile picture, and an optional accessibility-assistance flag. Accessibility information is treated as sensitive and is shared with our on-site staff only to provide you with assistance on the day of your visit.
Walk-in booking details: if you book in person at our reception desk without an account, we record your name and phone number to manage your booking and admission.

Booking details: your dates, party size (adults, children, any extra persons), number of cars, accessibility needs, assigned places (cabin, cabana, umbrella, or seat), and your booking and visit (QR) codes.
On-site and gate records: check-in and check-out times and counts, and a log of each QR scan at the gate, including the result and the staff member involved.
Service records: notes our staff may add about your visit, and internal tags we use to manage our relationship with you (these are not shown to you).

Payment information: the payment method, amount, currency, status, and transaction references from our payment provider. For certain wallet or bank-transfer payments taken at reception, a photo of the payment proof.

Technical and device data: your session and sign-in information, and the IP address and browser type recorded for security and audit purposes (for example, during sign-up, password reset, and sensitive account actions).
Communications and acceptance records: emails we send you (such as verification and password-reset links) and timestamps recording when you accepted our terms and any category-specific conditions.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
body: We use your information to provide and manage your bookings, prepare your visit codes, and check you in and out at the gate. We use identity documents to verify guests at entry where this is required.

We process payments through our payment provider, send you service messages such as verification and receipts, respond to your support requests, and keep records needed to run the resort safely and securely. We may also review booking volumes in aggregate to plan capacity.

Our legal bases are: performing the contract for your booking; complying with legal, tax, and security obligations; your consent (for example, optional details you choose to provide); and our legitimate interest in keeping the resort and our systems secure. We retain certain records to detect fraud and to enforce bans where an account or identity has been blocked.
sections.note: We don't use your data for advertising. We limit ourselves to what's needed to run your booking, secure your account, and improve our service inside the resort.

sections.heading: How We Share Information
body: We do not sell your personal information. We share it only with the parties needed to provide your booking and run the resort, and only to the extent necessary.

We share information with: our payment provider (Crédit Agricole) to process online card and wallet payments; identity and login providers (such as Google) when you choose to sign in with them; and our hosting, database, and email delivery providers who operate our systems on our behalf.
bullets: Payment provider: Crédit Agricole processes your online card and wallet payments and confirms their status; we receive transaction references back, not your full card number. Some wallet, bank-transfer, or cash payments made at our reception desk are handled directly at the resort and are not processed by Crédit Agricole.
Login providers: when you choose to sign in with a third-party account, that provider shares basic profile information with us.
Resort and gate staff: our on-site reception and gate staff see the booking, party, and identity details needed to admit you and assist you.
Service providers: hosting, database, and email services that operate strictly on our instructions.
Authorities: we may disclose information when required by law, by a valid legal request, or to protect the safety and rights of guests, staff, and the resort.

sections.heading: Payments & Financial Data
body: Online payments are completed through an external, secure checkout provider (Crédit Agricole). Your card details are entered on the provider's own secure systems, and our app never sees or stores your full card number.

We keep only the information needed to manage your booking and finances: the payment method, amount, currency, payment and invoice status, timestamps, and the provider's transaction references. For wallet or bank-transfer payments taken at reception, we may store a photo of your payment proof as part of the transaction record. These payment-proof images may contain financial details and are accessible only to authorized staff.
sections.note: Your financial data is protected. All online payments are encrypted and processed on Crédit Agricole's certified, card-security-compliant infrastructure.

sections.heading: How Long We Keep Your Data
body: We keep your personal information for as long as your account is active and as long as we need it to provide your bookings and meet our legal, tax, security, and accounting obligations.

Booking, payment, and gate admission records, and identity-document images captured at check-in, are retained as part of our financial and security records for the periods required by law and our internal policies. Certain security and audit records — including gate scan logs, audit logs, and blocked-identity records — are retained on a long-term or permanent basis to protect the resort and enforce bans, and are not routinely deleted. Where an account or identity has been blocked, we retain the relevant identifiers to enforce that block and prevent re-registration. When other information is no longer needed, we delete it or keep it only in a limited, secured form.

sections.heading: How We Protect Your Data
body: We protect your information using encryption in transit (HTTPS), hashed passwords, and access controls that limit who can see your data. Staff access is restricted to the information needed for their role, sensitive actions are logged, and administrative notes about guests are kept internal. Identity-document and payment-proof images are access-restricted to authorized staff.

No method of transmission or storage is ever completely secure, so we cannot guarantee absolute security. If we become aware of a breach that affects you, we will act promptly and, where required, notify you and the relevant authorities.

sections.heading: Your Rights & Choices
body: You have rights over your personal information, and we want it to be easy for you to exercise them. Some rights may be limited where we are required to keep records by law (for example, financial or security records).
bullets: Access: ask for a copy of the personal information we hold about you.
Correction: update your name, contact details, and profile information at any time in your account Settings.

Deletion and account closure: ask us to close your account and delete your information, subject to records we keep for legal, financial, security, and fraud-prevention reasons. Closing your account deactivates it; some booking, payment, and security records are retained as described in How Long We Keep Your Data.
Objection and restriction: ask us to stop or limit certain uses of your information.
Withdraw consent: where we rely on your consent, you can withdraw it at any time without affecting past processing.
Contact us: reach our team using the contact details below to exercise any of these rights.

sections.heading: Cookies & Sessions
body: We use essential cookies to keep you signed in and to secure your session. These are necessary for the booking app to work, and the app cannot function properly without them.
We also store small preferences on your device, such as your chosen language and theme, to improve your experience. We do not use third-party advertising or cross-site tracking cookies.

sections.heading: Children's Privacy
body: Our accounts and bookings are intended for adults. We do not knowingly create accounts for children or collect their personal information directly.
Children may attend the resort as guests of an adult who makes the booking. They are admitted as part of the party's headcount, and we do not capture identity-document images for children.

sections.heading: Changes to This Policy
body: We may update this policy from time to time to reflect changes in our services, technology, or legal requirements. The "last updated" date at the top always shows the most recent version.
If we make material changes, we will make them clear through the app or by other appropriate means. Your continued use of Crown Island after an update means you accept the revised policy.

privacy.contactBody: If you have any questions about this policy or wish to exercise your privacy rights, please reach our privacy and support team using the contact details below.
privacy.helpBody: Our guest-services team is ready to help with any question about your data and privacy.
privacy.endnote: © 2026 Crown Island · El Montazah — All rights reserved.
